_doc: Sharpshooter — long-range archer ally. Third soldier class (PR #5c, polished 2026-05-08 with arc trajectory + draw animation + hunter-green palette). Held BOW stays visible during attacks (key divergence from scout — only the arrow leaves the bowstring). ContactDamage uses lineWidth 0.5 + pierce true to damage EVERY enemy along a 15u forward ray; CombatVFX spawns a brown-shaft / steel-tip arrow that arcs (Bezier mid-point lift 1.2u) over a 0.32s flight, trailing an ivory tether and leaving a muted earth scorch-line. HP 50, 25 DMG per pierce, 1.2s cooldown, applies Bleeding DoT (4/s × 3s, crimson emissive). HeroAI guardRadius 12 + attackRange 15.0. Movement speed 4. Body hunter-green 0x2d5a2d, bow dark walnut 0x4a2e1a — proper archer vibe.
